briefs.title: BC Small Claims Court rules updated to reflect Civil Resolution Tribunal changes, effective January 19, 2026
briefs.summary: Starting January 19, 2026, BC's Small Claims Court rules are updated to remove procedures that overlapped with the Civil Resolution Tribunal (an online dispute resolution body that handles many small claims before they reach court). The changes clean up outdated rules and clarify how cases that started at the Civil Resolution Tribunal are transferred to Small Claims Court.
briefs.action_required: If you have an active or upcoming Small Claims Court matter in BC, confirm with the court registry that the new rules apply to your case after January 19, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Small Claims Rules amendments take effect
